html:
Exclusive to:

Power OnPower Off

The Sealed Portal is naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be found in the Ancient Archive.

It appears to be the only device in the Ancient Archive that will not be activated once the Archive Switch is turned on.

Rope

A rope can be tied to the rock of the Chasm, creating a way for players to climb up from Sealed Portal to the lobby of Sanctum.

Trivia

  • The Sealed Portal was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
  • As of yet, the Sealed Portal has no known function.
plainText:
Sealed Portal
Source
Ancient Archive
Miscellaneous
"archive_portal"
Exclusive to:
Power OnPower Off
“Strange, the power is on but this isn't.”
–Wilson, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Shoulda known it wouldn't be that easy.”
–Willow, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Maybe is just pretty floor.”
–Wolfgang, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Not everything can come back so easily.”
–Wendy, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“LINK BROKEN”
–WX-78, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“A shame, it appears to no longer be operational.”
–Wickerbottom, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Guess that door's closed for good.”
–Woodie, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Still inactive. Curious.”
–Maxwell, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“If it is a gate, it hath been firmly shut.”
–Wigfrid, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Aw, this one didn't turn back on.”
–Webber, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Ah, I shouldn't have gotten my hopes up.”
–Warly, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Stuck closed”
–Wormwood, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Come on! Why won't you work?”
–Winona, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“My my, someone didn't want this door opened.”
–Wortox, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Still not pond.”
–Wurt, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Weird, this is the only thing that didn't turn back on.”
–Walter, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Well, it was worth a try.”
–Wanda, examining when Archive Switch is on.
“Dead as a dead doornail.”
–Wilson, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“Another portal? You don't think...?”
–Willow, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“Is another door?”
–Wolfgang, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“It's long dead.”
–Wendy, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“GATEWAY IS INOPERATIVE”
–WX-78, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“The design is reminiscent of the Gateways we've traversed through before.”
–Wickerbottom, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“Hey Lucy, maybe that's a way outta here!”
–Woodie, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“It couldn't be...”
–Maxwell, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“Anöther gate betwixt wörlds?”
–Wigfrid, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“Maybe it used to go somewhere?”
–Webber, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“Could this be a way home?”
–Warly, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“Door?”
–Wormwood, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“Is that... a portal? Maybe we can get it up and running!”
–Winona, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“I won't tell the mortals it's here, it'll just get their poor hopes up.”
–Wortox, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“It look like pond, but not.”
–Wurt, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“I wonder what this did?”
–Walter, examining when Archive Switch is off.
“Hm, maybe this time...”
–Wanda, examining when Archive Switch is off.
The Sealed Portal is naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be found in the Ancient Archive.
It appears to be the only device in the Ancient Archive that will not be activated once the Archive Switch is turned on.
Rope[edit | edit source]
Rope
Miscellaneous
"ceiling_rope"
“It's a climbing rope.”
–Wilson
“Dibs!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is mighty climber.”
–Wolfgang
“A way out.”
–Wendy
“PRIMITIVE BUT NECESSARY”
–WX-78
“A tried and true means of escape.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a nice climbing rope.”
–Woodie
“Is it time to leave this accursed place?”
–Maxwell
“With this, I shall make mine ascent!”
–Wigfrid
“We love climbing!”
–Webber
“If you can't take the heat, climb the rope!”
–Warly
“Helpful friend”
–Wormwood
“Good to have a way out.”
–Winona
“For when it's time to climb!”
–Wortox
“Climbing easy.”
–Wurt
“Good thing I have my climbing badge!”
–Walter
“Always prudent to have a way back.”
–Wanda
A rope can be tied to the rock of the Chasm, creating a way for players to climb up from Sealed Portal to the lobby of Sanctum.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Sealed Portal was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
As of yet, the Sealed Portal has no known function.

The '''Sealed Portal''' is naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It can be found in the [[Ancient Archive]].

It appears to be the only device in the Ancient Archive that will not be activated once the [[Archive Switch]] is turned on.
